_comment: RDMA Python Image Pipeline — Node 1 (processor / receiver).  Run on machine 1.
_comment3: The host frees stream slot 20 and resets its Python cursor before each rdma_recv
_comment4: so img_rotate reads exactly one fresh image per round.

nodes._comment: ─── 3-round PyPipeline: recv image from node 0 → process → export ───────────
nodes._comment2: rdma_recv populates stream slot 20 before each round from node 0 (peer 0).
nodes._comment3: The Python image stages use _read_stream_latest(slot) (reads all, returns last)
nodes._comment4: so they are safe to call each round regardless of cursor state.

nodes._comment: ─── Save 3 processed images from I/O slot 1 to disk ────────────────────────
─── Free intermediate stream slots and I/O slots ────────────────────────────
